ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the vehicle record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model ended production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the metric belongs to */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic centimeters */,
  "horsepower" REAL /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Emission levels of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the fuel tank in gallons */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle in miles per hour */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the performance metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country of origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the country of origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "wikipedia_url" TEXT /* URL of the Wikipedia page for the vehicle type */,
  "average_mpg" REAL /* Average miles per gallon for vehicles of this type */,
  "average_weight" INTEGER /* Average weight for vehicles of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_type_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type association */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_type_associations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_type_associations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel in MJ/L */,
  "cost_per_gallon" REAL /* Average cost per gallon of the fuel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_type_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type association */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_type_associations_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_type_associations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "number_of_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "torque_capacity" INTEGER /* Torque capacity of the transmission in lb-ft */,
  "wikipedia_url" TEXT /* URL of the Wikipedia page for the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_type_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type association */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_type_associations_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_type_associations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
